verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jehovah Jireh, my provider You're more than enough for me. Jehovah Rapha, You're my healer, by Your stripes, I have been set free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jehovah Shamma, You are with me and You supply all of my needs; You are more than enough You are much more than enough, You are more than enough for me.
